basic_details.job_title: DHGMCH House Staff / Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 56 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Diamond Harbour Government Medical College & Hospital (DHGMCH)
basic_details.short_information: The latest Diamond Harbour Government Medical College & Hospital (DHGMCH) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for House Staff / Junior Resident posts! Published on 11 May 2026 at dhgmc.edu.in, this new recruitment drive offers 56 vacancies for eligible candidates. Applicants within the Max: 35 years age group and possessing an MBBS Degree with completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) and WBMC Registration can apply offline from 11 May 2026 to 15 May 2026. Find all details about the DHGMCH House Staff / Junior Resident new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, offline form,

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree, Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch), Provisional or Permanent Registration with West Bengal Medical Council (WBMC)
qualification.details: ANAESTHESIOLOGY: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration BLOOD BANK: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration CCU: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration CHEST MEDICINE: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration DERMATOLOGY: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration EMERGENCY MEDICINE: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration ENT: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration G & O: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration GENERAL MEDICINE: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration OPHTHALMOLOGY/EYE: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration ORTHOPAEDICS: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration PAEDIATRICS: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration PATHOLOGY: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration PSYCHIATRY: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration GENERAL SURGERY: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration FORENSIC MEDICINE: MBBS Degree + Completion of Compulsory Rotating Internship (2020-2026 batch) + WBMC Registration

salary_details.pay_scale: As per memo no. HF/O/MERT/250/ME/MISC-109-2025, Dated-21.03.2025
salary_details.details: The salary for the House Staff / Junior Resident posts will be as per memo no. HF/O/MERT/250/ME/MISC-109-2025, Dated-21.03.2025.

selection_process: Merit List based on Academic Performance Counselling for Department Allocation
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dhgmc.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DHGMCH House Staff / Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DHGMCH House Staff / Junior Resident posts is 15-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum qualifications required for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS Degree, have completed their Compulsory Rotating Internship between 2020 and 2026, and hold Provisional or Permanent Registration with the West Bengal Medical Council (WBMC).

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for House Staff / Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 56 vacancies available for the House Staff / Junior Resident positions across various departments at Diamond Harbour Government Medical College & Hospital.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all applicants is 35 years. Specific age relaxation details, if any, should be confirmed by referring to the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the DHGMCH House Staff / Junior Resident recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the House Staff / Junior Resident posts will be determined as per memo no. HF/O/MERT/250/ME/MISC-109-2025, Dated-21.03.2025.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the DHGMCH recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the House Staff / Junior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared from academic performance, followed by counselling for department allocation.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Diamond Harbour Government Medical College & Hospital, which is www.dhgmc.edu.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates, as specified in the official notification.
